<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <title data-cms="cms-265">Guardz: Agentic Cybersecurity Platform for MSPs</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Guardz is the agentic cybersecurity platform with 24/7 MDR trusted by MSPs to protect SMB clients from phishing, account takeovers, data loss & ransomware. AI-native security." data-cms="cms-266">
    <link rel="icon" href="https://guardz.com/favicon.ico">
    <link rel="canonical" href="https://guardz.com/">
    <meta name="robots" content="index,follow">
    <meta property="og:title" content="Guardz: Agentic Cybersecurity Platform for MSPs" data-cms="cms-267">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Protect your clients with AI-native security. Unify email, endpoint, and cloud protection with 24/7 managed detection and response." data-cms="cms-268">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563986768609-322da13575f2?w=1200&h=630&fit=crop" data-cms="cms-269">
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
    <meta name="twitter:title" content="Guardz: Agentic Cybersecurity Platform for MSPs" data-cms="cms-270">
    <meta name="twitter:description" content="Protect your clients with AI-native security. Unify email, endpoint, and cloud protection." data-cms="cms-271">
    <meta name="twitter:image" content="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563986768609-322da13575f2?w=1200&h=630&fit=crop">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/icon?family=Material+Icons" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* Design System */
        :root {
            --brand-hue: 220;
            --brand: hsl(var(--brand-hue) 90% 60%);
            --brand-light: hsl(var(--brand-hue) 85% 70%);
            --brand-dark: hsl(var(--brand-hue) 90% 40%);
            --surface: hsl(var(--brand-hue) 20% 6%);
            --surface-mid: hsl(var(--brand-hue) 18% 12%);
            --surface-high: hsl(var(--brand-hue) 15% 18%);
            --surface-glass: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            --text: hsl(var(--brand-hue) 25% 95%);
            --text-muted: hsl(var(--brand-hue) 15% 65%);
            --text-dim: hsl(var(--brand-hue) 10% 45%);
            --accent: hsl(270 85% 65%);
            --accent-glow: hsla(270 85% 65%, 0.3);
            --success: hsl(160 85% 55%);
            --radius: 12px;
            --radius-lg: 20px;
            --radius-xl: 32px;
        }

        /* Reset & Base */
        *, *::before, *::after {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }
        
        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            background-color: var(--surface);
            color: var(--text);
            line-height: 1.7;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            width: 100%;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
        }

        /* Noise Texture Overlay */
        .poster-container::before {
            content: '';
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 512 512' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 0.3;
            z-index: 1000;
        }

        /* CMS Container */
        .poster-container {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 720px;
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: var(--surface);
            position: relative;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        /* Mesh Gradient Background */
        .mesh-bg {
            background-color: hsl(var(--brand-hue) 20% 6%);
            background-image:
                radial-gradient(at 15% 15%, hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 40%, 0.15) 0%, transparent 50%),
                radial-gradient(at 85% 10%, hsla(270 85% 40%, 0.12) 0%, transparent 45%),
                radial-gradient(at 50% 80%, hsla(200 85% 35%, 0.1) 0%, transparent 50%),
                radial-gradient(at 80% 60%, hsla(var(--brand-hue) 90% 50%, 0.08) 0%, transparent 40%);
        }

        /* Layout */
        header, main, footer {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 0 24px;
        }

        /* Scroll-Driven Animations */
        @keyframes fade-up {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(50px); }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }
        @keyframes fade-in {
            from { opacity: 0; }
            to { opacity: 1; }
        }
        @keyframes scale-in {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.9); }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
        }
        
        .animate-on-scroll {
            animation: fade-up linear both;
            animation-timeline: view();
            animation-range: entry 0% entry 20%;
        }
        
        .animate-scale {
            animation: scale-in linear both;
            animation-timeline: view();
            animation-range: entry 0% entry 25%;
        }

        /* Animated Gradient Text */
        @keyframes gradient-shift {
            0%, 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
            50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
        }
        .gradient-text {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand-light), var(--accent), var(--brand), var(--accent));
            background-size: 300%;
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            animation: gradient-shift 6s ease infinite;
        }

        /* Header */
        header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding-top: 20px;
            padding-bottom: 20px;
            z-index: 100;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            background: hsla(var(--brand-hue) 20% 6%, 0.85);
            backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%);
            border-bottom: 1px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 30% 40%, 0.1);
        }
        
        .logo {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: var(--text);
            text-decoration: none;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            letter-spacing: -0.5px;
        }
        
        .logo-icon {
            color: var(--brand);
            font-size: 28px;
        }

        /* Navigation */
        nav ul {
            display: flex;
            list-style: none;
            gap: 32px;
        }

        nav a {
            color: var(--text-muted);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 15px;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            position: relative;
        }

        nav a::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -4px;
            left: 0;
            width: 0;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--brand);
            transition: width 0.3s ease;
            border-radius: 1px;
        }

        nav a:hover {
            color: var(--text);
        }
        
        nav a:hover::after {
            width: 100%;
        }

        /* Main Content */
        main {
            z-index: 10;
            flex-grow: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 80px;
            padding-top: 80px;
            padding-bottom: 80px;
        }

        /* Hero Section */
        section#hero {
            text-align: center;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 28px;
            padding: 40px 0;
        }

        .hero-badge {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 8px 20px;
            background: hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.1);
            border: 1px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.3);
            border-radius: 50px;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--brand-light);
            font-weight: 500;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 56px;
            font-weight: 900;
            line-height: 1.05;
            letter-spacing: -2px;
            color: var(--text);
            max-width: 95%;
        }

        .hero-sub {
            font-size: 18px;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            max-width: 580px;
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        .hero-ctas {
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
            margin-top: 8px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            border: 2px solid transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        .btn-primary {
            background: var(--brand);
            color: white;
            box-shadow: 0 0 30px hsla(var(--brand-hue) 90% 60%, 0.3),
                        0 0 60px hsla(var(--brand-hue) 90% 60%, 0.15);
        }

        .btn-primary:hover {
            transform: translateY(-3px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 40px hsla(var(--brand-hue) 90% 60%, 0.4),
                        0 0 80px hsla(var(--brand-hue) 90% 60%, 0.2);
        }

        .btn-ghost {
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            border-color: hsla(var(--brand-hue) 30% 40%, 0.3);
        }

        .btn-ghost:hover {
            color: var(--text);
            border-color: var(--text-muted);
            background: hsla(var(--brand-hue) 30% 40%, 0.1);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* Hero Visual */
        .hero-visual {
            width: 100%;
            height: 380px;
            margin-top: 48px;
            position: relative;
            border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 30% 40%, 0.15);
            box-shadow: 0 40px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
        
        .hero-visual img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            opacity: 0.7;
            transition: transform 0.6s ease;
        }
        
        .hero-visual:hover img {
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }
        
        .dashboard-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(
                to bottom,
                hsla(var(--brand-hue) 20% 6%, 0) 0%,
                hsla(var(--brand-hue) 20% 6%, 0.3) 50%,
                hsla(var(--brand-hue) 20% 6%, 0.95) 100%
            );
        }

        /* Features Section */
        section#features {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 48px;
        }

        .section-header {
            text-align: center;
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 40px;
            font-weight: 800;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            color: var(--text);
            letter-spacing: -1px;
        }
        
        .section-desc {
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 18px;
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        /* Bento Grid Layout */
        .features-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr);
            gap: 20px;
        }

        .feature-card {
            background: var(--surface-glass);
            border: 1px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 30% 40%, 0.12);
            padding: 32px 28px;
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(150%);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(150%);
            transition: all 0.4s ease;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 20px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .feature-card::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: radial-gradient(
                circle at var(--mouse-x, 50%) var(--mouse-y, 50%),
                hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.06) 0%,
                transparent 60%
            );
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        .feature-card:hover::before {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .feature-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-6px);
            border-color: hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.25);
            box-shadow: 0 32px 64px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
        }

        .card-wide { grid-column: span 7; }
        .card-tall { grid-column: span 5; grid-row: span 2; }
        .card-small { grid-column: span 5; }

        .icon-box {
            width: 56px;
            height: 56px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.15), hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.05));
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: var(--brand);
            font-size: 28px;
            border: 1px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.2);
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--text);
        }

        .feature-text {
            font-size: 15px;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        /* Benefits Section */
        section#benefits {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 48px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .benefits-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 32px;
        }

        .benefit-item {
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
            align-items: flex-start;
        }

        .benefit-icon {
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            background: hsla(160 85% 55%, 0.1);
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: var(--success);
            font-size: 24px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .benefit-text h4 {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            color: var(--text);
        }

        .benefit-text p {
            font-size: 15px;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            line-height: 1.6;
        }

        .benefits-visual {
            position: relative;
            height: 400px;
            border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 30% 40%, 0.15);
        }

        .benefits-visual img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }

        /* Testimonials Section */
        section#testimonials {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 40px;
        }

        .testimonials-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 24px;
        }

        .testimonial-card {
            background: var(--surface-glass);
            border: 1px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 30% 40%, 0.12);
            padding: 32px;
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(150%);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(150%);
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 20px;
        }

        .testimonial-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-4px);
            border-color: hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.2);
        }

        .stars {
            color: hsl(45 100% 60%);
            display: flex;
            gap: 4px;
            font-size: 18px;
        }

        blockquote {
            font-size: 16px;
            color: var(--text);
            line-height: 1.7;
            font-style: normal;
        }

        .testimonial-author {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .avatar {
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            object-fit: cover;
            border: 2px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.3);
        }

        .author-info p {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--text-muted);
        }

        .author-name {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text);
        }

        /* FAQ Section */
        section#faq {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 32px;
            max-width: 640px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .faq-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 16px;
        }

        details {
            background: var(--surface-glass);
            border: 1px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 30% 40%, 0.12);
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        details[open] {
            border-color: hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.25);
            box-shadow: 0 16px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
        }

        summary {
            padding: 24px 28px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 17px;
            color: var(--text);
            list-style: none;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        summary:hover {
            background: hsla(var(--brand-hue) 30% 40%, 0.05);
        }

        summary::-webkit-details-marker {
            display: none;
        }

        summary::after {
            content: '+';
            font-size: 24px;
            color: var(--brand);
            font-weight: 300;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        details[open] summary::after {
            transform: rotate(45deg);
        }

        .faq-answer {
            padding: 0 28px 24px;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 15px;
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        /* CTA Section */
        section#cta {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 80px 40px;
            background: linear-gradient(
                135deg,
                hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.1) 0%,
                hsla(270 85% 65%, 0.08) 100%
            );
            border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
            border: 1px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.2);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        section#cta::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: radial-gradient(
                circle at 30% 30%,
                hsla(var(--brand-hue) 85% 60%, 0.15) 0%,
                transparent 50%
            );
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        section#cta h2 {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .cta-features {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 32px;
            margin-top: 32px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .cta-feature {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 15px;
        }

        .cta-feature i {
            color: var(--success);
            font-size: 20px;
        }

        /* Footer */
        footer {
            border-top: 1px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 30% 40%, 0.1);
            padding-top: 48px;
            padding-bottom: 48px;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .footer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 48px;
            margin-bottom: 48px;
        }
        
        .footer-brand p {
            color: var(--text-dim);
            font-size: 14px;
            margin-top: 16px;
            max-width: 280px;
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        .footer-col {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 16px;
        }
        
        .footer-col span {
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }
        
        .footer-col a {
            color: var(--text-dim);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }

        .footer-col a:hover {
            color: var(--text);
        }

        .footer-bottom {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding-top: 32px;
            border-top: 1px solid hsla(var(--brand-hue) 30% 40%, 0.1);
        }

        .footer-bottom p {
            color: var(--text-dim);
            font-size: 13px;
        }

        .social-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
        }

        .social-links a {
            color: var(--text-dim);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 20px;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .social-links a:hover {
            color: var(--brand);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* Mobile Menu */
        .menu-toggle { display: none; }
        .mobile-menu { display: none; }
        .menu-btn { display: none; }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .nav-desktop { display: none; }
            .menu-toggle { display: block; }
            .menu-btn {
                display: block;
                background: none;
                border: none;
                color: var(--text);
                font-size: 28px;
                cursor: pointer;
                padding: 8px;
            }
            .mobile-menu {
                display: none;
                position: fixed;
                top: 0;
                left: 0;
                width: 100%;
                height: 100vh;
                background: hsla(var(--brand-hue) 20% 6%, 0.98);
                backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
                -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
                flex-direction: column;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                gap: 32px;
                z-index: 200;
            }
            .menu-toggle:checked + .mobile-menu {
                display: flex;
            }
            .mobile-menu a {
                font-size: 24px;
                color: var(--text);
                text-decoration: none;
                font-weight: 600;
                transition: color 0.3s;
            }
            .mobile-menu a:hover {
                color: var(--brand);
            }

            h1 {
                font-size: 42px;
            }
            
            .features-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            
            .card-wide, .card-tall, .card-small {
                grid-column: span 1;
                grid-row: span 1;
            }

            section#benefits {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 40px;
            }

            .testimonials-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }

            .footer-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
                gap: 32px;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body data-cms-collection="col1">
    <div class="poster-container mesh-bg" data-cms-item="col1">
        <header id="site-header">
            <a href="https://guardz.com/" class="logo">
                <span class="gradient-text" data-cms="cms-1">Guardz</span>
                <i class="material-icons logo-icon" data-cms="cms-2">shield</i>
